services.name: Tree Removal
services.blurb: Safe sectional removal of hazardous, dead, and storm-damaged trees.

services.name: Tree Trimming & Pruning
services.blurb: Proper branch-collar cuts that protect tree health — no topping.

services.name: Stump Grinding
services.blurb: Ground 6–8 inches below grade so you can replant, build, or mow.

services.name: Emergency Storm Damage
services.blurb: 24/7 response when a tree is on your house, car, or blocking the road.

arkadelphiaCluster.name: Pine Tree Removal
arkadelphiaCluster.blurb: Loblolly & shortleaf pine removal done safely.

arkadelphiaCluster.name: Dead Tree Removal
arkadelphiaCluster.blurb: Safe removal of brittle, dying & dead trees.

arkadelphiaCluster.name: Stump Grinding
arkadelphiaCluster.blurb: Stumps ground below grade, ready to replant.

arkadelphiaCluster.name: Storm Damage Cleanup
arkadelphiaCluster.blurb: Downed trees, debris hauling & insurance help.
